applied_optimizations.name: im2col + Triton matmul
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented 1D convolution using im2col (torch.nn.functional.unfold) to convert conv to matmul, then using Triton matmul kernel. Achieves 11.0ms vs 3.93ms baseline (0.36x speedup).

attempted_but_failed.name: Direct conv with tl.dot and 2D weight loading
attempted_but_failed.error: RuntimeError: failed to translate module to LLVM IR - occurs consistently with 2D weight offset calculations on AMD ROCm Triton

attempted_but_failed.name: Batched matmul kernel
attempted_but_failed.error: Complex batch indexing in kernel led to incorrect results

attempted_but_failed.name: Scalar loop kernel
attempted_but_failed.error: Scalar loops over 64 input channels and 3 kernel positions create high overhead

top_bottlenecks: Triton matmul not as optimized as MIOpen
Generic matmul kernel not tuned for this shape

notes: Direct conv1d with tl.dot has LLVM issues on AMD ROCm
im2col approach works around LLVM issues
Future: need tl.dot fix or aiter tuned GEMM

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output at all — the agent has crashed/timed out in 3 consecutive trials (2, 3, 4). With 31 minutes left, this is the last chance. Providing complete, copy-paste-ready kernel code.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 5 produced no output — 4th consecutive crash/timeout. With ~30 minutes left, providing a complete, minimal kernel file the agent must literally write and benchmark without any debugging or itera
